rationale: Budget v3 — refreshed after zero-tech-debt sweep (PRs A-F): route-auth 264→0 (false-positives fixed + annotations); detector-suite 120s+→1.3s flake fix; 5 console.logs swept; 115 unbounded Maps→LruMap; 222 sync-fs calls in handlers→async or skip-architectural; 498 SELECT * → 18 annotated + rule tightened. Current total: 1598. Budget set at 1700 (~6% grace) for normal churn. Remaining categories are observability-gap (500), macro-usage (353), stale-code (211), env-config-drift (195), resource-leak (194), fake-data (131) — broader codebase concerns tracked separately, not deploy-blocking.
